patch.value:
## Context

`src/core/search/cache.ts:471-476`:
```ts
if (ledgerRead.embedding && hasVectorizationEmbeddingIdentityChanged(ledgerRead.embedding, embeddingIdentity)) {
  return { refreshed: [], skipped: ..., warnings: ['search_semantic_refresh_requires_reindex:embedding_identity_changed'] };
}
```

This warning is emitted silently into the background worker output (not surfaced to the user on mutation). The user only discovers the problem when `pm health` shows `stale_items_before_total > 0` or when search quality degrades after a provider switch.

`pm reindex` already resets the vector store and re-embeds everything, but the user must know to run it. There is no auto-detect on the mismatch that triggers a user-visible prompt or automated action.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `pm health` surfaces a specific warning when `embedding_identity_changed` is detected (not just advisory)
- [ ] `pm reindex` detects the identity mismatch and prompts/warns: 'Provider or model has changed since last index. Run pm reindex --mode semantic to rebuild.'
- [ ] OR add `pm reindex --auto-migrate` that detects the mismatch and runs automatically
- [ ] Document the provider-switch workflow in COMMANDS.md / AGENT_GUIDE

## Evidence

- `src/core/search/cache.ts:471-476` — silent skip on identity change
- `src/core/search/vectorization-metadata.ts:62-67` — `hasVectorizationEmbeddingIdentityChanged` — the check exists but its output is only a background warning
- `src/cli/commands/reindex.ts` — no identity-mismatch check before starting
Embedding provider migration guide + pm reindex --migrate: automated full reindex on model/provider change

When a user changes their embedding provider or model (e.g. ollama model upgrade, switch from ollama to openai), the background refresh worker silently skips embedding refreshes with warning 'search_semantic_refresh_requires_reindex:embedding_identity_changed'. There is no clear guidance, automated migration step, or 'pm reindex --migrate' flag that detects this condition and automatically runs a full reindex.

- `pm health` surfaces a specific warning when `embedding_identity_changed` is detected (not just advisory)
- `pm reindex` detects the identity mismatch and prompts/warns: 'Provider or model has changed since last index. Run pm reindex --mode semantic to rebuild.'
- OR add `pm reindex --auto-migrate` that detects the mismatch and runs automatically
- Document the provider-switch workflow in COMMANDS.md / AGENT_GUIDE
